revision.text: {{Sandbox other||{{module rating|protected}} {{High-use}}}} {{Lua|Module:Portal|Module:Yesno|Module:Arguments}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Module:Portal bar/styles.css}} This module implements the {{tl|portal bar}} template. It displays a horizontal bar of [[Wikipedia:Portal |portals]]. See [[Template:Portal bar/testcases|here]] and [[Template:Related portals2/testcases|here]] for testcases. '''Note''': in order to make the test cases work, the Sandbox CSS classes have "-sand" appended to their names. If you wish to update the CSS, copy the contents of each class from [[Module:Portal bar/sandbox/styles.css]] to [[Module:Portal bar/styles.css]], but do '''not''' alter the class names, nor just copy-paste the entire CSS file. For the current difference in CSS between Sandbox and Main, see [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:ComparePages?page1=Module%3APortal+bar%2Fstyles.css&rev1=&page2=Module%3APortal+bar%2Fsandbox%2Fstyles.css&rev2=&action=&diffonly=&unhide= here]. == Usage == {{#invoke:Portal bar|main|''portal 1''|''portal 2 ''|...|border=''no''}} * Positional parameters - the names of the portals to be displayed. * border - if {{para|border}} is equal to no, n, false, or 0, then the portal box will have no border. * redlinks - if {{para|redlinks}} is equal to yes, y, true or include, then the portal box will show redlinked portals == Examples == *{{#invoke:portal bar|main|Visual arts|Science|Literature}} Produces: {{#invoke:portal bar|main|Visual arts|Science|Literature}} *{{#invoke:portal bar|main|Visual arts|Science|Literature|border=no}} Produces: {{#invoke:portal bar|main|Visual arts|Science|Literature|border=no}} For further examples, see [[Template:Portal bar/testcases]]. == Images == This module uses [[Module:Portal]] to get portal images. To add, change, or remove images, please see the instructions at [[Module:Portal#Image]].

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: IMPORTING ALL WANTED MODULES
revision.text: {{Sandbox other||{{module rating|protected}} {{High-use}}}} {{Lua|Module:Portal|Module:Yesno|Module:Arguments}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Module:Portal bar/styles.css}} This module implements the {{tl|portal bar}} template. It displays a horizontal bar of [[Wikipedia:Portal |portals]]. See [[Template:Portal bar/testcases|here]] and [[Template:Related portals2/testcases|here]] for testcases. '''Note''': in order to make the test cases work, the Sandbox CSS classes have "-sand" appended to their names. If you wish to update the CSS, copy the contents of each class from [[Module:Portal bar/sandbox/styles.css]] to [[Module:Portal bar/styles.css]], but do '''not''' alter the class names, nor just copy-paste the entire CSS file. For the current difference in CSS between Sandbox and Main, see [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:ComparePages?page1=Module%3APortal+bar%2Fstyles.css&rev1=&page2=Module%3APortal+bar%2Fsandbox%2Fstyles.css&rev2=&action=&diffonly=&unhide= here]. == Usage == {{#invoke:Portal bar|main|''portal 1''|''portal 2 ''|...|border=''no''}} * Positional parameters - the names of the portals to be displayed. * border - if {{para|border}} is equal to no, n, false, or 0, then the portal box will have no border. * redlinks - if {{para|redlinks}} is equal to yes, y, true or include, then the portal box will show redlinked portals == Examples == *{{#invoke:portal bar|main|Visual arts|Science|Literature}} Produces: {{#invoke:portal bar|main|Visual arts|Science|Literature}} *{{#invoke:portal bar|main|Visual arts|Science|Literature|border=no}} Produces: {{#invoke:portal bar|main|Visual arts|Science|Literature|border=no}} For further examples, see [[Template:Portal bar/testcases]]. == Images == This module uses [[Module:Portal]] to get portal images. To add, change, or remove images, please see the instructions at [[Module:Portal#Image]].

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Sandbox other||{{module rating|protected}} {{High-use}}}} {{Lua|Module:Portal|Module:Yesno|Module:Arguments}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Module:Portal bar/styles.css}} This module implements the {{tl|portal bar}} template. It displays a horizontal bar of [[Wikipedia:Portal |portals]]. See [[:en:Template:Portal bar/testcases|here]] and [[Template:Related portals2/testcases|here]] for testcases. '''Note''': in order to make the test cases work, the Sandbox CSS classes have "-sand" appended to their names. If you wish to update the CSS, copy the contents of each class from [[Module:Portal bar/sandbox/styles.css]] to [[Module:Portal bar/styles.css]], but do '''not''' alter the class names, nor just copy-paste the entire CSS file. For the current difference in CSS between Sandbox and Main, see [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:ComparePages?page1=Module%3APortal+bar%2Fstyles.css&rev1=&page2=Module%3APortal+bar%2Fsandbox%2Fstyles.css&rev2=&action=&diffonly=&unhide= here]. == Usage == {{#invoke:Portal bar|main|''portal 1''|''portal 2 ''|...|border=''no''}} * Positional parameters - the names of the portals to be displayed. * border - if {{para|border}} is equal to no, n, false, or 0, then the portal box will have no border. * redlinks - if {{para|redlinks}} is equal to yes, y, true or include, then the portal box will show redlinked portals == Examples == *{{#invoke:portal bar|main|Visual arts|Science|Literature}} Produces: {{#invoke:portal bar|main|Visual arts|Science|Literature}} *{{#invoke:portal bar|main|Visual arts|Science|Literature|border=no}} Produces: {{#invoke:portal bar|main|Visual arts|Science|Literature|border=no}} For further examples, see [[:en:Template:Portal bar/testcases|Template:Portal bar/testcases]]. == Images == This module uses [[Module:Portal]] to get portal images. To add, change, or remove images, please see the instructions at [[Module:Portal#Image]].
